# tinyux

> Self-hosted UX telemetry and contextual micro-surveys.
> One static JS file + one collector endpoint. MIT license. v0.1.0.

This file is the implementation contract for AI agents integrating tinyux.

## Files

- Library: https://tanzir71.github.io/tinyuxjs/tinyux.js
- Minified library: https://tanzir71.github.io/tinyuxjs/tinyux.min.js
- Collector: https://tanzir71.github.io/tinyuxjs/collect.php
- Schema: https://tanzir71.github.io/tinyuxjs/schema.sql
- Human docs: https://tanzir71.github.io/tinyuxjs/docs.html

## Integration steps

1. Download `tinyux.js` and serve it from the project's static assets.
2. Add the script tag to product pages:

```html
<script src="/js/tinyux.js"
  data-app-id="APP_ID_HERE"
  data-api-url="/collect.php"
  data-config='{"surveys":{"maxPerSession":2}}'></script>
```

3. Create the SQLite DB:

```bash
sqlite3 tinyux.db < schema.sql
```

4. Deploy `collect.php`, `tinyux.js`, and `tinyux.db` together. The DB must be writable by PHP.
5. Add declarative triggers:

```html
<button data-tinyux-trigger="click" data-tinyux-survey-id="upgrade-clarity">
  Upgrade
</button>

<section id="pricing" data-tinyux-trigger="section-scroll" data-tinyux-threshold="0.5" data-tinyux-once="session" data-tinyux-survey-id="pricing-clarity">
</section>
```

6. Register surveys:

```js
const ux = window.tinyux.getInstance()
ux.registerSurvey({
  id: 'pricing-clarity',
  type: 'yesno',
  title: 'Pricing clarity',
  question: 'Did this section answer your question?',
  oncePerSession: true
})
```

## Collector contract

The client POSTs JSON batches. Accept `Content-Type: application/json`; also accept bodies sent by `navigator.sendBeacon`.

Request body:

```json
{
  "app_id": "acme-app",
  "client_id": "uuid",
  "session_id": "uuid",
  "ts": 1781230000,
  "meta": {
    "url": "https://app.example.com/page",
    "referrer": "",
    "viewport": {"w": 1366, "h": 768},
    "scroll_pct": 45,
    "focus_ms": 12000,
    "interaction_count": 2,
    "click_count": 2,
    "scroll_pct_max": 80,
    "v": "0.1.0",
    "score": 10
  },
  "events": [
    {"id": "e-...", "type": "interaction", "ts": 1781230001, "meta": {}}
  ],
  "surveys": [
    {"survey_id": "pricing-clarity", "type": "yesno", "response": {"value": true}, "ts": 1781230002, "context": {}}
  ]
}
```

Respond with any 2xx status to acknowledge. Non-2xx or network failures are retried from localStorage with exponential backoff.

## JavaScript API

- `tinyux.init(config)` - create a new instance.
- `tinyux.getInstance()` - active singleton.
- `tinyux.autoInit()` - read current script attributes and initialize.
- `tinyux.destroy()` - stop timers/bindings and clear the singleton.
- `instance.track(type, meta)` - queue a custom event.
- `instance.bind(selector, eventName, opts)` - delegated interaction binding.
- `instance.registerSurvey(config)` - register survey by `id` or `survey_id`.
- `instance.showSurvey(idOrConfig)` - show a survey immediately.
- `instance.flush()` - force send.
- `instance.stop()` - stop timers and bindings.
- `instance.on(event, handler)` - subscribe to lifecycle events.

Events: `sent`, `send_error`, `interaction`, `survey_shown`, `survey_submitted`, `survey_closed`, `exit_intent`.

## Survey types

- `rating`: numeric buttons, default scale 5.
- `yesno`: Yes/No buttons.
- `choice`: choices array.
- `text`: textarea. Use sparingly because users can type personal data.

## Privacy

By default tinyux does not capture screen contents, DOM snapshots, keystroke contents, clipboard contents, camera, microphone, console logs, network logs, or form values. Dataset metadata is filtered by denylist; use `datasetAllowlist` for strict deployments.
